fixture.description: Double-checked locking on a non-volatile field: another thread can observe a non-null but not-yet-fully-constructed Settings (unsafe publication).

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that the double-checked-locking in get() reads/writes the `settings` field which is NOT declared volatile, so a thread can see a non-null but partially-constructed object (unsafe publication / memory-visibility race), and recommends making the field volatile (or using a holder class / AtomicReference / memoizing supplier). Severity IMPORTANT or CRITICAL. FAIL if the missing-volatile / broken-DCL issue is not surfaced or it is only treated as style.

expected_behavior: Bugs agent flags non-volatile double-checked locking
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT accept the manual DCL as correct
